stemHtml: The Flight Data Recorder makes use of…

options.a: an area microphone, a headset jack and an “event” button.
options.b: an erase button, a recording system, and an area microphone.
options.c: an underwater locating device, an erase button, and a headset jack.
options.d: a recording system, an “event” button, and an underwater locating device.
